descriptionHtml:
Beneteau Oceanis 41.1 for sale 2017 | 3 Cabins Version | Tax Not Paid

If you are interested in a modern, well-equipped cruiser, the Beneteau Oceanis 41.1 for sale 2017 provides a solid option. She’s currently available under a private owner, flying the Polish flag, and has VAT paid – making transfer straightforward. Presented in good condition, she is suited for family cruising and comfortable coastal or offshore adventures. Recent upgrades highlight thoughtful care and ongoing maintenance, with key components replaced in 2024.

General Specifications

  • Model: Beneteau Oceanis 41.1
  • Year Built: 2017
  • Type: Sailing yacht
  • Flag: Polish
  • Ownership: Private
  • VAT Status: Paid
  • Condition: Good

Dimensions and Layout

  • Length Overall (LOA): 12.43 m
  • Beam: 4.2 m
  • Draft: 1.76 m
  • Displacement: --
  • Cabins: 3 double
  • Berths: 8
  • Heads: 1
  • Onboard Capacity: 8

Sails and Deck Equipment

  • Fully Battened Mainsail: Replaced in 2024
  • Roller Genoa: Replaced in 2024
  • Bimini & Sprayhood: New in 2024
  • Bathing Platform: Yes
  • Cockpit Table with Icebox: Yes
  • Cockpit Cushions: Yes
  • Deck Shower: Yes
  • Cockpit Anchor Windlass Remote: Yes

Navigation and Electronics

  • Instrument Brand: Full set of B&G instruments
  • Plotter: Yes
  • Autopilot: B&G
  • GPS: Yes

Engine and Tanks

  • Engine: Yanmar 4JH45, 45hp, S-Drive
  • Engine Hours: 1,560 (as of November 2025)
  • Fuel Tank Capacity: 200 litres
  • Water Tank Capacity: 570 litres

Steering and Control

  • Steering Wheels: 2

Comfort and Entertainment

  • Electric Fridge: Yes
  • Sound System: Fusion Bluetooth MP3, cockpit speakers
  • Cockpit Cushions: Yes

Other Features

  • Outboard: Yes
  • Dinghy: Yes

Summary

The Beneteau Oceanis 41.1 for sale 2017 combines modern sailing performance and liveaboard comfort. With three double cabins and a spacious saloon, she offers flexible accommodation for up to eight guests. The single, well-positioned head provides convenience, while the cockpit layout is designed for both relaxation and practical sailing.

Overall, the Beneteau Oceanis 41.1 for sale 2017 stands out for those seeking a good-condition cruising yacht with recent upgrades and well-considered features, ready for many more adventures. For further information, viewing arrangements, or questions, interested parties are encouraged to get in touch.
